pi_items.metadata_value: Primary: Unsplash images, Fallback: Synthetic checkerboard pattern
pi_items.verified_value: Confirmed - setup script attempts real Unsplash URLs, falls back to ImageMagick-generated synthetic checkerboard if downloads fail

pi_items.source: Official GIMP 2.10 documentation and verified in codebase

privileged_info_summary: The task.json contains no explicit metadata field. Task uses real data from Unsplash (verified URLs accessible: 800x600 JPEG and 800x448 PNG) with fallback to synthetic ImageMagick-generated checkerboard patterns. The verifier correctly implements edge similarity analysis using MSE and seam variance detection. CRITICAL ISSUE: Task setup script contains incorrect GIMP menu path instruction - claims 'Filters → Distorts → Tile Seamless' but official GIMP 2.10 documentation specifies 'Filters → Map → Tile Seamless'. This error would cause agents to fail the task unless they discover the correct menu path.
